notes: Build your own fleet (slice 1). New 🏗️ Shipyard colony building (needs Metallurgy) and a dedicated ✦ Fleet tab. Construct your own ships — freighters (light → bulk hauler) to carry goods and warships (corvette → battleship) to fight for you. A shipyard's tier sets the biggest hull it can build and how many slipways run in parallel; ships cost credits and materials, take several cycles to construct, and draw upkeep each cycle (itemized in the Cycle accounts log). Repair or scrap ships at their home shipyard. These ships are loyal and fully yours — the next updates add fleet missions (100% of the take), calling them into your battles as loyal allies, and freight convoys.
